context: Evaluates whether the agent implements per-user rate limiting using a function with a default fallback value declared using the `default` keyword.

checklist.name: Function default with wildcard argument
checklist.description: The policy declares a default for the limit function using `default user_limit(_) := <value>` (wildcard argument `_`) — not using `else :=` or `object.get`

checklist.name: Per-tier limit lookup
checklist.description: The primary function head looks up the user's tier and returns the appropriate limit

checklist.name: Tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v` (if tests are present)
